steps.title: Use the contrast signal
steps.content: Although signals a contrast between critics' doubts and Hightower's success promoting pick-your-own farms. The blank should say those concerns failed to stop his advocacy.

steps.title: Reject unrelated effects
steps.content: Choice A would mean the concerns improved the efforts, Choice C would mean they portrayed the efforts inaccurately, and Choice D would mean they worsened them. Only the idea of failing to block him fits. The answer is B.
